general_tips.best_arrival: Arrive at least 90 minutes before kickoff. Gates open 2.5-3 hours before the match. Security screening is fastest in the first hour of gate opening.
general_tips.peak_entry_times: 60-30 minutes before kickoff is the busiest time at security. Avoid arriving in this window if possible.
general_tips.peak_concourse_times: Halftime sees the highest concourse traffic. Visit food courts and restrooms early in each half to avoid queues.
general_tips.exit_strategy: Leave 5 minutes before the final whistle to beat the crowd, or wait 20-30 minutes after the final whistle for crowds to thin.
general_tips.crowd_density_zones: Gate areas, main concourse intersections, and escalator/elevator banks experience the highest crowd density. Use alternative routes when possible.

atl-mbs.crowd_tip: Gate C sees 35% more traffic than Gate D. Use Gate D if coming from the south side.

sea-lumen.crowd_tip: South Gate is less used. Great for families and accessibility needs.

hou-nrg.crowd_tip: Blue Lot fans create heavy traffic at Gate B. Consider Gate D.

nyc-metlife.crowd_tip: NJ Transit arrivals crowd Gate B. Use Gate C for faster entry.

dal-att.crowd_tip: Gate 4 has the shortest security wait times on average.

mex-azteca.crowd_tip: Metro arrivals crowd Puerta 3. Use Puerta 4 for less congestion.
